description: Memorandum (tadhkira) from Nissim b. Benaya, in Alexandria, to Abū l-Karam Marwān, probably in Fustat. Dating: early 12th century. Ordering 50 zabdiyyas (a type of vessel) with decorations in color. He offers to send the payments to the addressee or to his brother Abū l-Faḍl. Greetings to ʿArūs (b. Yosef). (Information in part from Mediterranean Society, V, p. 145 and from Goitein's index card.)
